summary: Implement category-weighted epsilon-greedy skill injection to improve exploration relevance from 1.3% to 100% for matching categories

changes: Added _weightedRandomSkill(skills, taskContext) method to prefer category-relevant skills
Updated _applyEpsilonGreedy() to accept taskContext parameter and use weighted selection
Updated selectSkills() to pass taskContext to _applyEpsilonGreedy()
Added 2 new test cases for epsilon-greedy weighted injection
details.backward_compatibility: Full - non-matching categories fall back to full pool
details.performance_impact: Negligible - O(n) filter operation only during epsilon-greedy injection (~50% of time)
